lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: The area under the palace is going to be excavated soon, and I'm guarding the entrance to it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I see. Can I go down there?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: There's not even a rope to let you down there. You'd break both your legs if you tried it.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: I'm surprised you managed to get out of there without breaking any bones.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Still, the Queen says it should be safe, and I'm to let you go back down if you want.
